children.text: The debate within an elite Panamanian family sparked by the popular referendum on the expansion of the Panama Canal is illustrated through a poetic journey along a river, a coastline, and an interoceanic canal. Through this journey, the Panamanian documentary Familia explores whether what is understood as development truly serves human beings, or whether, on the contrary, human beings have been placed in the service of the variables of a particular notion of development.
